title: Rich Dutch Pineapple Skillet
description: A tangy and indulgent Dutch dish featuring pineapple, ferment-kimchi, and high-protein friendly ingredients, perfect for a hearty dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the ferment-kimchi, soy sauce, and brown sugar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the pineapple chunks to the skillet and stir to combine.
Create 4 wells in the skillet and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top with shredded cheese and crispy bacon.
